name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝗶𝘀 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘀𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗲𝗹𝘀𝗲? | what are those noises Satoru is hearing from your apartment?

RIP everyone who feels guilt easily (I'm never going to forgive myself for this)
Obviously, this is inspired by "Is there someone else?" - The Weeknd

I've actually thought of some different scenarios you can turn this into, feel free to read 😝:

- the noise is actually you just watching por-
- bonus points if it's a tape of you and Satoru...
- it's a sexy scene from a movie
- you're actually just trying to get yourself off by thinking about him
